name: Sunrise Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Salt or less or none
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream margarine, egg whites, lemon rind, juice, and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Sift together dry ingredients and add alternately with yogurt to the egg white mixture.
4. Fold in fruit and spread into a tube pan sprayed with nonstick spray.
5. Combine all topping ingredients (using the same bowl and incorporating scrapings from the batter) and sprinkle over the coffee cake.
6. Bake for about 35 minutes until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve topped with yogurt, if desired. Makes 16 servings.
